action.reasoning: Observation: 3-model ConvNeXt ensemble achieved new best 0.7998. Each ConvNeXt training takes ~3-4 min. Analysis: With 14 iterations and 4.5h left, I can train 1-2 more diverse models to push ensemble higher. Adding another seed should yield diminishing returns. Better idea: train a model at higher resolution (e.g., 256) or with different recipe for diversity. Let me train cnxt4 with seed=789 and slightly more epochs (5-6) for diversity, then eval.
